_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 49: Registration
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded by the CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard.
basis: EU AI Act Annex VIII -- Information to be submitted upon registration
EU AI Act Article 71 -- EU database for high-risk AI systems

requirements.title: EU Database Registration
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST register themselves and their high-risk AI system in the EU database before market placement.
requirements.rationale: Art. 49(1) requires pre-market registration for Annex III systems.
required_information: Status of the system (on market, withdrawn, recalled)
Member States where placed on market

scoring.compliant: R01 met (registration completed with Annex VIII information)
